name: Termite Soldier

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It lunges forward with a single short bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block from the front or step out of its short reach.
attacks.notes: Its pressure tool while it has not committed to a stronger move yet.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It chains several quick bites without moving far from its spot.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not punish the first hit; wait until the full sequence ends.
attacks.notes: Much more dangerous in narrow tunnels where other termites can block your retreat.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It pulls its head back before lunging with a longer bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Move to the side instead of backing straight away.
attacks.notes: It reaches farther than the normal bite and punishes players who try to heal at mid-range.

attacks.name: Stunning Bite
attacks.tell: It flattens its body and opens its jaws fully before releasing the strike.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block or dodge it cleanly; if it lands, the pack usually gets a free punish.

attacks.name: Sawdust Attack
attacks.tell: It buries its head into the ground before kicking a sawdust cloud forward.
attacks.howToAvoid: Start moving as soon as you see it digging; the cloud is worse than the hit itself.
attacks.notes: The cloud reduces both movement speed and attack speed.

description: A heavy soldier termite that guards the deeper corridors of the den. It serves as the martial version of the workers: tougher, meaner, and far worse in groups.
behavior: It patrols the tunnels for intruders and almost never leaves its burrow. It keeps the usual termite bites, but also digs up and hurls a sawdust cloud that weakens its target.
interactionWithPlayer: It is immediately aggressive and usually fights with backup. It can pressure you with chained bites or force you to move with sawdust so other termites can collapse on you.
interactionWithCreatures: Despite resembling other soldier insects, it is fairly passive toward most creatures outside combat. It always remains loyal to workers and the Termite King.
strategy: The real problem is not one soldier, but two or three at once. Bring a tier 3 weapon, break line of sight on the sawdust clouds, and punish only after blocking the bite sequence.
respawnInfo: 3 days by default. In the Undershed it takes 2 days.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 65
3-Combo Bite: 60
Charged Bite: 70
Stunning Bite: 90
Sawdust Attack: 40

specialTraits: It is immune to dust. Its sawdust cloud reduces both movement speed and attack speed.
